rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue with Trump still signaling Iran deal is close — energy price volatility risk for Poland persists but no qualitative change from last cycle.

top_events.title: Israeli strike on Beirut suburb, Trump says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli strikes on Beirut keep Middle East tensions elevated, indirectly threatening energy price stability relevant to Polish households. No qualitative escalation beyond prior cycle.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU formally advancing Ukraine membership talks is a continuation of the known process — no qualitative leap affecting Poland's eastern border situation or refugee flows.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian oil tanker funding Ukraine war
top_events.summary: UK seizure of a Russian shadow-fleet tanker is a minor positive signal for sanctions enforcement, with marginal indirect relevance to Poland's security posture against Russia.
